layers.title: Add Sampler Design Context
layers.summary: The first layer records the new logging design in repo context and routes future logging questions to the sampler design. It frames the change as unified random sampling with hot-path constraints and worker-to-client propagation.
layers.diff:
+| design unified class-based random log sampling | `modules/infra/logging/log-sampler-design.md` | `src/datasystem/common/log/*`, `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/*`, `src/datasystem/common/metrics/hard_disk_exporter/*`, `src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/*` |
+- `LogSampler` provides unified random hash-threshold sampling across request/access/diagnostic dimensions, with per-request granularity and low-overhead hot-path decisions.
+# Log Sampler Design
+## Goals
+- Support external API access / client access log sampling, with hot paths deciding before `AccessRecorder`,
+  `RequestParam`, elapsed-time calculation, `RequestParam::ToString()`, and `HardDiskExporter::Send()`.

layers.title: Replace User Guidance
layers.summary: Building on the design context, the user-facing docs remove first-N `log_rate_limit` guidance and document the three decimal sample rates. The docs also remove the standalone client environment variable and explain request-only derivation behavior.
layers.diff:
-| 25 | `DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT` | `0` | 每秒采样请求数上限（0表示不限速）。仅对带 traceId 的请求日志生效：被采样到的请求会完整打印链路日志，未采样请求的链路日志会被整体丢弃（包含 WARNING/ERROR/FATAL）。 |
-大流量场景下，可通过 `log_rate_limit` 参数控制每秒采样请求数，避免高频请求日志产生过多磁盘 I/O。
+LogSampler 提供统一随机哈希阈值采样，替代旧的 `log_rate_limit` first-N 限速机制。
+- 三类独立采样率：`request_sample_rate`、`access_sample_rate`、`diagnostic_sample_rate`（各 0.0–1.0，默认 1.0=全量保留）

bcFindings.evidence: docs/source_zh_cn/appendix/client_env_guide.md removes the documented client environment variable instead of mapping it to the new sampler configuration.

layers.title: Change Sampling Protocol
layers.summary: This layer introduces `LogSampleConfigPb` as the structured transport for sampler state. Register responses replace the old scalar `log_rate_limit` field with this message, and heartbeat responses now also carry sampler config.

layers.title: Expose New Config Flags
layers.summary: On top of the protocol change, the worker configuration surface moves from an integer rate limit to three validated double sample rates. Dynamic flag updates are batched transactionally before publishing a new sampler snapshot.

layers.title: Propagate Worker Authority
layers.summary: After parsing the new flags, worker register and heartbeat responses publish the effective sampler config to clients. Client worker common APIs apply `log_sample_config` from both register and heartbeat paths so clients use worker-authoritative decisions.

layers.title: Update Deployment Configs
layers.summary: The final configuration layer carries the new parameters into default worker config and Helm rendering. This keeps operator-provided config aligned with the new gflags and removes the old deployment knob.

bcFindings.evidence: include/datasystem/utils/embedded_config.h removes LogRateLimit(int) and replaces it with RequestSampleRate(double), AccessSampleRate(double), and DiagnosticSampleRate(double).
src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto changes field 24 from int32 log_rate_limit to LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config.
src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/flags.h removes log_rate_limit from the runtime-updatable flag list and replaces it with request/access/diagnostic sample rates.

layers.title: Add Snapshot Sampler
layers.summary: This layer adds the `LogSampler` singleton, immutable snapshots, ppm-to-threshold conversion, sticky explicit-rate derivation, and hot-path predicates. Snapshot publication uses atomics with old snapshots retained for lifetime-style safety instead of ref-counting in the hot path.

layers.title: Wire Runtime Logs
layers.summary: The logging macros now ask `LogSampler` before constructing ordinary and PLOG message streams, while preserving FATAL pass-through. Trace eager rate-limit decisions are removed and ZMQ metadata now propagates sampler request decisions.

layers.title: Remove Rate Limiter
layers.summary: With the sampler in place, the old spdlog `LogRateLimiter` target and implementation are deleted from build graphs. This removes the per-second first-N limiter API and shifts log admission to randomized sampler predicates.
layers.diff:
-        "//src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog:log_rate_limiter",
+ds_cc_library(
+    name = "log_sampler",
+    srcs = ["log_sampler.cpp", "log_sampler_proto.cpp"],
+    hdrs = ["log_sampler.h"],
+)
-diff --git a/src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.cpp b/src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.cpp
-deleted file mode 100644
-diff --git a/src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h b/src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h
-deleted file mode 100644

bcFindings.evidence: src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h and .cpp are deleted and the build dependency is removed.

layers.title: Replace Recorder API
layers.summary: This layer changes `AccessRecorder` from direct `Record(...)` overloads into object, stream, and request-out facade recorders. The facades defer field materialization and check `ShouldRecordInternal()` before storing expensive fields.

layers.title: Migrate Client Paths
layers.summary: Client-facing C, C++, Java, Python binding, hetero, object, KV, and stream call sites are moved to the lazy facade API. Relative to the recorder layer, these call sites stop prebuilding `RequestParam` and string data sizes before the sampler admits a record.

layers.title: Migrate Worker Paths
layers.summary: Worker object-cache, stream-cache, request-table, ETCD request-out, and resource metric paths are updated to the same facade types. This extends the sampled-out fast path across service handlers and async return paths without changing their RPC signatures.

bcFindings.evidence: src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h removes the old Record overloads and replaces direct calls with Object/Stream/RequestOut facades.
src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h removes the integer-code Record overload that accepted string dataSize.
src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h removes the stream Record overload and introduces StreamAccessRecorder::Record().

layers.title: Add Sampler Unit Tests
layers.summary: The unit layer adds focused tests for sampler decisions, access sampling, config parsing, integration behavior, and facade formatting. Existing log-message and logging tests are updated from rate-limiter expectations to sampler semantics.
layers.diff:
+ds_cc_test(
+    name = "log_sampler_test",
+    srcs = ["log_sampler_test.cpp"],
+)
+ds_cc_test(
+    name = "log_sampler_access_test",
+    srcs = ["log_sampler_access_test.cpp"],
+)
+TEST_F(LogSamplerAccessTest, ShouldRecordAccessTypeClientAccess)
+TEST_F(LogSamplerConfigTest, LogSampleConfigPbDisabledNoPpm)

layers.title: Replace Rate-Limiter Tests
layers.summary: After the new sampler tests, the old `log_rate_limiter_test` target and source are deleted. The performance test is rewritten around sampler overhead and access-recorder sampled-in/sample-out scenarios.

layers.title: Cover Cross-Process State
layers.summary: The final test layer adds system and RPC metadata coverage for worker-to-client config propagation and per-request sampling state. This matches the protocol layer's requirement that decisions remain consistent across process boundaries.

summary: This PR replaces first-N log rate limiting with a worker-authoritative random LogSampler, propagates structured sampling config, migrates access logging to lazy facades, updates deployment/docs, and adds sampler-focused UT/ST/performance coverage.
